name: Solid Bathroom Wastebasket Tan - Threshold™: Bohemian Style, 13.19" Height, 568.1ml Capacity
description:
Maintain a clean look in your bathroom with this Solid Bathroom Wastebasket from Threshold™. Featuring a natural, woven exterior and removable plastic insert, this woven bathroom wastebasket brings a touch of boho flair to your interiors, and its discreet style is perfect to hide away unsightly trash. You'll love the plastic bin insert that lets you empty the contents with minimal effort and the added lid that maintains a clutter-free look in any part of your bathroom. Coordinate with matching bathroom accessories for a cohesive, coordinated look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
